Plus: PSG face Bayern Munich.

Vergil Ortiz Jr. returns to defend his unbeaten record against Erickson Lubin in a high-stakes Texas showdown.

Exclusively with Spanish commentary.

📅 Saturday | 8pm ET | 5pm PT
